tools.name: list_pages
tools.description: List every Medius documentation page (path, title, section). Start here to see what the docs cover.

tools.name: get_page
tools.description: Return the full Markdown of one documentation page by its path, e.g. "/library/clip" or "/native/commands/inject".

tools.name: search_docs
tools.description: Full-text search the Medius docs. Returns ranked pages with a snippet; follow up with get_page for the full Markdown.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search the Medius documentation and return matching pages. Use the returned id with the fetch tool to read a page.

tools.name: fetch
tools.description: Fetch the full Markdown of one documentation page by its id (the id returned by search).

findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "search" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.

findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "fetch" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.
